text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ooh, another point for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The score's 3-0 now! Hehe! Come on, Scarlet,
you've got to try harder than that!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze! How are you so good at this, Fine?!
choice_data_list: Hey! What are you all up to?
Hey! What are you all up to?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. We're playing one-on-one futsal.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was feeling a little down earlier because of
how poorly I scored on a test...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Ughh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That was some sigh. I wonder if something
happened...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Scarlet! Let's play a game or two before
training starts!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A game? Of what?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of kicking a ball into a goal! Each goal is one
point!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So, what do you say to some futsal with me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Futsal?! With you? B-but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's not like you have anything better to do, right?
I'll referee for you two.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And before I knew it, we'd already started
playing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I decided I would simply win and get it over with,
but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Fine is too good at futsal!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? You're not planning to forfeit
already, are you? Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you look so smug. All right, that's it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to score at least once, no matter what it
takes!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My! Is this what you're like when you're serious?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm... If I'd been just a little faster, I would've
been able to cut you off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Scarlet, your acceleration is incredible.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Don't you dare underestimate what I'm
capable of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No longer seeming upset, Daiwa Scarlet continues
playing futsal with Fine Motion for a while longer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff! Ugh, I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've finally got the hang of this, though. The next
goal is mine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Come on, one more round!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Completely absorbed in their intense game,
Daiwa Scarlet is able to forget her troubles and
have fun.
